arts.ttl: Monaco is floundering and needs goals fast from new signing Mika Biereth
arts.sum: He netted 14 goals in 25 games in the first half of this season for the Austrian side, earning him a four-and-a-half year deal with Monaco, and he made his debut in Tuesday’s French Cup defeat to Reims. Mika Biereth’s career resembles that of a journeyman despite him being only 21, and when the London-born Danish striker joined Monaco last week it was already his fifth club.

arts.ttl: Milan’s Luka Jovic Attracts Interest from Sevilla and Monaco
arts.sum: Milan's Serbian forward Luka Jovic is drawing attention from multiple clubs as the January transfer window heats up. Alongside interest from AS Monaco, Sevilla have emerged as a serious contender for his signature. The post Milan’s Luka Jovic Attracts Interest from Sevilla and Monaco appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Adi Hütter clarifies AS Monaco’s goalkeeper situation
arts.sum: Adi Hütter was definitive in pre-season, stating that Radoslaw Majecki, having displaced Philipp Köhn in the second half of last season, would be AS Monaco’s No. 1 this campaign. However,…
